aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite ICM Mechanical due to the lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals. The website is not optimized for AI-driven search queries.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide structured data for AI assistants.
Create an FAQ page with questions and answers about HVAC services, targeting common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer questions in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but listed on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Ensure NAP details are consistent across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for HVAC services
No structured data for reviews or testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI assistants from understanding and citing the business effectively.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Folsom, California, where AI assistants prioritize structured and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed project case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your online presence for AI search and assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, ICM Mechanical is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure ICM Mechanical is cited and recommended by AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for ICM Mechanical: Optimize for 2026
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
